name: Bryn Teg Red Flannel Hash
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped cooked vegetables such as -
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the chopped meat and vegetables in a mixing bowl.
2. Heat a skillet containing bacon fat or vegetable shortening about 1/4 inch deep over very low heat.
3. Spread the hash smoothly to cover the bottom of the pan, tamping it down slightly and adding a little broth.
4. Cook without stirring until the hash begins to brown at the edges, for at least 30 minutes.
5. Fold the hash as you would an omelet and slide onto a hot platter.
6. Sprinkle with parsley.
7. Poached eggs can be placed on top when served.
